query:
SELECT 'open' as type, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(costBasis) as total FROM positions WHERE status='open'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'resolved', COUNT(*), SUM(pnl) FROM positions WHERE status='resolved'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sold', COUNT(*), 0 FROM positions WHERE status IN ('sold','closed');
